6 key takeaways from: This Week in Threats: Apr 07–Apr 21, 2026

1. CVE-2026-21643 — Fortinet SQL Injection Vulnerability
2. CVE-2026-1340 — Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM) Code Injection Vulnerabili
3. CVE-2026-34197 — Apache ActiveMQ Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
4. CVE-2009-0238 — Microsoft Office Remote Code Execution
5. CVE-2023-21529 — Microsoft Exchange Server Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vul
6. CVE-2026-34621 — Adobe Acrobat and Reader Prototype Pollution Vulnerability

Which one surprised you the most? Comment below!
